name: remotion-volunteer-impact
description: Proof of Play — volunteer impact stat reveal for social media

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts VolunteerImpact out/volunteer-impact.mp4
scripts.render:story: npx remotion render src/index.ts VolunteerImpactStory out/volunteer-impact-story.mp4
scripts.still: npx remotion still src/index.ts VolunteerImpact --frame=200 out/still.png
